scripts.predev: bash -lc 'if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -ti tcp:5173 -ti tcp:8787 | xargs -r kill -9; elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then fuser -k 5173/tcp 8787/tcp || true; fi'
scripts.predev:ui: bash -lc 'if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -ti tcp:5173 | xargs -r kill -9; elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then fuser -k 5173/tcp || true; fi'
scripts.predev:worker: bash -lc 'if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -ti tcp:8787 | xargs -r kill -9; elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then fuser -k 8787/tcp || true; fi'
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run deploy:worker
